narrative:
Precinct Chillicothe 1-A (precinct in Ross County) has 950 registered voters, with 56.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.4%, a modest Republican lean of 2.6 percentage points.
